groups.name: replay
groups.description: Configuration properties for Spring Replay request capture and test generation.

properties.name: replay.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the Replay functionality. If disabled, no requests will be captured.

properties.name: replay.dashboard-enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the Replay web dashboard. The dashboard provides a UI to view captured requests and generate test code.

properties.name: replay.max-captured-requests
properties.description: Maximum number of requests to store in memory. Oldest requests will be removed when this limit is reached (FIFO behavior).

properties.name: replay.exclude-paths
properties.description: List of Ant-style path patterns to exclude from request capture. Requests matching these patterns will not be recorded. The /replay/** and /actuator/** paths are always excluded.

properties.name: replay.exclude-headers
properties.description: List of HTTP header names that should be redacted in captured requests. These headers will be stored as [REDACTED] for security reasons. Header matching is case-insensitive.
